news source save reflects on public sources list
subscription plan create and support unread simulation work through admin endpoints
routes are responsive at 360x800

admin can login and navigate key tabs

superadmin password reveal requires MFA + reason

specs.title: manual payment and expense entries are accepted
due ledger update and reminder flow works
student can create support ticket and admin can update it
backup run is successful and restore guard requires typed confirmation
major import templates and export endpoints respond successfully
bulk update changes university state and persists
question-bank import preview endpoint accepts file payload and returns non-crashing response
question-bank bulk tag update works for an existing item
canonical /__cw_admin__/news routes resolve without runtime failures
